description: Style Note Wear this kurta to work or for traditional family functions. With variety and style on their side, span kurtas fulfil the ethnic requirements of your wardrobe. Colourful with a contemporary edge, you can wear these kurtas with contrasting leggings or churidars and ethnic sandals for an easy traditional look.Product Details Green kurta, has a mustard panel at the yoke with floral detailing, side slits, three quarter sleeves with panelling at the cuffs, round neckline and panelling above the hemline in the frontMaterial and Care 100% cotton Dry clean onlySize and Fit Regular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
